title: Fed officials see rate hike ahead if inflation stays elevated, minutes show
summary: Federal Reserve officials indicated they may raise interest rates if inflation remains elevated, as documented in recent meeting minutes. The potential rate increases reflect concerns about prolonged inflation pressures that could harm economic growth.
content: A majority of officials anticipated that interest rate increases would be necessary if the Iran war continued to aggravate inflation.

zh.title: 美联储官员表示如果通胀保持高位可能加息，会议记录显示
zh.summary: 美联储官员在最近的会议记录中表示，如果通胀保持高位，他们可能会提高利率。这些潜在的利率上升反映了对持续通胀压力的担忧，这些压力可能会损害经济增长。

title: Nvidia earnings live updates: The key numbers to watch for in the report
summary: Nvidia is reporting its Q1 earnings results after market close with an analyst conference call at 5 p.m. ET. This earnings report will reveal key financial metrics for the semiconductor giant.
content: Nvidia is reporting its first-quarter results after the market closes. The conference call with analysts is scheduled for 5 p.m. ET.

zh.title: 英伟达财报直播更新：报告中需要关注的关键数据
zh.summary: 英伟达将在美股收盘后公布第一季度财报，并于美国东部时间下午5点召开分析师电话会议。这份财报将揭示这家芯片巨头的关键财务指标。

title: Vox’s sale marks the end of an era for a once-booming form of digital media. Here’s how it all came undone.
summary: Vox Media's sale marks the decline of a once-booming digital media industry, following similar struggles at BuzzFeed and Vice. These companies, which were valued in the billions, have collapsed due to shifting audience preferences and advertising revenue declines.
content: Companies like BuzzFeed, Vice and Vox were once worth billions, but shifting audiences and declines in advertising have sent their values plummeting.

zh.title: Vox的出售标志着曾经繁荣的数字媒体时代的终结。以下是它如何衰落的
zh.summary: Vox Media的出售标志着曾经繁荣的数字媒体行业的衰退，紧跟BuzzFeed和Vice的类似困境。这些曾经估值数十亿的公司由于受众偏好改变和广告收入下降而崩溃。

title: Bezos defends billionaires, hypes AI, talks taxes and praises Trump in major CNBC interview
summary: Jeff Bezos defended billionaires and promoted AI investments in a major CNBC interview, while dismissing claims that Amazon's Melania Trump documentary was designed to gain favor with President Trump. He also discussed tax policy and praised the Trump administration.
content: Jeff Bezos rejected accusations that Amazon's decision to release a documentary on first lady Melania Trump was an effort to curry favor with the president.

zh.title: 贝索斯为富豪辩护、力推人工智能、讨论税收政策并在CNBC采访中赞扬特朗普
zh.summary: 杰夫·贝索斯在一次重要的CNBC采访中为富豪辩护并推崇人工智能投资，同时驳斥亚马逊的梅拉尼亚·特朗普纪录片是为了取悦特朗普总统的说法。他还讨论了税收政策并对特朗普政府表示赞扬。

title: Wendy's taps former Potbelly CEO to lead struggling burger chain
summary: Wendy's has hired a former Potbelly CEO to lead the struggling burger chain as investor Nelson Peltz's Trian Fund Management seeks funding to take the company private. This leadership change reflects efforts to revitalize the company's performance.
content: Nelson Peltz's Trian Fund Management is seeking funding to take Wendy's private, according to a Financial Times report.

zh.title: 温迪汉堡聘请前Potbelly首席执行官领导陷入困境的连锁汉堡店
zh.summary: 温迪汉堡聘请了宝贝潘(Potbelly)的前首席执行官来领导这家陷入困境的汉堡连锁店，投资者纳尔逊·佩尔茨旗下的Trian基金管理公司正在寻求资金以将公司私有化。这一管理层变更反映了公司复兴业绩的努力。

title: Zuckerberg's Meta layoffs memo: 'Success isn't a given' in the AI era
summary: Meta commenced a major workforce reduction affecting roughly 10% of employees, approximately 8,000 jobs, as CEO Mark Zuckerberg emphasized that success in the AI era is not guaranteed. The layoffs signal the company's pivoting strategy toward artificial intelligence development.
content: Meta on Wednesday commenced its latest round of layoffs affecting about 10% of the company's workforce, equating to roughly 8,000 jobs.

zh.title: 扎克伯格Meta裁员备忘录：人工智能时代"成功并非必然"
zh.summary: Meta实施了大规模劳动力裁减，影响约10%的员工、约8000个工作岗位，首席执行官马克·扎克伯格强调在人工智能时代成功并无保障。此次裁员表明公司正在调整战略以专注于人工智能开发。

title: Stocks rally and oil falls. Plus, the implications of Samsung averting a strike
summary: The Investing Club's Homestretch provides a weekday afternoon market update covering stock rallies, oil price movements, and Samsung's successful strike avoidance. This actionable summary arrives ahead of the final trading hour.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: 股票上涨，石油下跌。另外，三星避免罢工的影响
zh.summary: 投资俱乐部的"收盘前"栏目提供工作日下午市场更新，涵盖股票上涨、油价波动和三星成功避免罢工。这份实用摘要在最后交易时段前发布。

title: Fed minutes show increased chances of interest-rate hike
summary: Federal Reserve minutes indicate increased probability of an interest rate hike as officials assess growing risks of prolonged inflation. The economic data suggests the Fed may need to tighten monetary policy.
content: Fed officials see a growing risk that inflation would stay higher for longer.

zh.title: 美联储会议纪要显示加息概率上升
zh.summary: 美联储会议纪要显示，随着官员评估长期通胀风险增加，加息概率上升。经济数据表明美联储可能需要收紧货币政策。

title: UAE says new pipeline that will bypass Strait of Hormuz is nearly 50% complete
summary: The UAE's new oil pipeline, designed to bypass the strategic Strait of Hormuz chokepoint, is nearly 50% complete and offers significant geopolitical diversification. The existing Fujairah pipeline has redirected some exports with a capacity of 1.8 million barrels daily.
content: The UAE has redirected some oil exports through an existing pipeline to Fujairah, which has a maximum capacity of 1.8 million barrels per day.

zh.title: 阿联酋称绕过霍尔木兹海峡的新管道已近50%完成
zh.summary: 阿联酋新建石油管道旨在绕过战略性霍尔木兹海峡，已接近50%完成，提供重要的地缘政治多元化。现有的富查伊拉管道已重定向部分出口，日产能为180万桶。

title: Trump's face doesn't belong on U.S. passport, senators tell Rubio
summary: U.S. senators have opposed a State Department special edition passport featuring President Trump's likeness, raising concerns about the appropriateness of the design. The Trump administration's commemorative passport edition has drawn political criticism.
content: The State Department announced a special edition U.S. passport that will feature President Donald Trump's likeness.

zh.title: 特朗普的脸不应该出现在美国护照上，议员告诉鲁比奥
zh.summary: 美国议员反对国务院发行的特朗普护照特别版，对设计的合适性提出了担忧。特朗普政府的纪念护照版引发了政治批评。

title: Something very unusual is happening with Nvidia options
summary: Ahead of Nvidia earnings, short-dated call options are trading at elevated premiums compared to puts, indicating unusual options market positioning. This pattern suggests heightened investor expectations and volatility around the earnings announcement.
content: Ahead of earnings, NVDA's short-dated calls are trading at a premium to puts.

zh.title: 英伟达期权发生了非常不寻常的事情
zh.summary: 在英伟达财报前，短期看涨期权相比看跌期权交易价格溢价升高，表明期权市场出现了不寻常的头寸配置。这种模式暗示投资者对财报公布周围的预期和波动性升高。

title: U.S. crude oil falls below $100 per barrel after Trump says Iran talks in final stages
summary: U.S. crude oil prices fell below $100 per barrel after President Trump announced the administration is in final stages of negotiations with Iran. The news of potential Iran deal progress triggered a decline in oil prices.
content: Trump told reporters that the administration was in the "final stages" of negotiations with Iran, according to a pool report.

zh.title: 特朗普称伊朗谈判处于最后阶段后，美国原油跌破每桶100美元
zh.summary: 在特朗普总统宣布政府与伊朗谈判处于最后阶段后，美国原油价格跌破每桶100美元。潜在伊朗交易进展的消息引发了油价下跌。

title: Artificial intelligence was supposed to reduce prices. Instead AI is boosting inflation.
summary: Artificial intelligence is unexpectedly contributing to inflation rather than reducing prices as previously anticipated, reaching a three-year high in the U.S. The AI boom, combined with oil prices and Trump tariffs, is driving inflationary pressures.
content: The upsurge in U.S. inflation, reaching a three-year high, has been fueled by rising oil prices and the residual effects of the Trump tariffs. But another thing is adding to the problem: the boom in artificial intelligence.

zh.title: 人工智能本应降低价格。反而AI推高了通胀。
zh.summary: 人工智能意外地加剧了通货膨胀，而不是如之前预期的那样降低价格，美国达到了三年来的高位。人工智能热潮结合油价和特朗普关税，正在推高通胀压力。

title: Cheap AI could derail OpenAI and Anthropic's IPOs
summary: Chinese AI labs are developing artificial intelligence capabilities comparable to American frontier models at significantly lower costs, potentially threatening planned IPOs by OpenAI and Anthropic. This cost advantage could disrupt the AI industry's competitive landscape.
content: Chinese AI labs are matching American frontier capability at a fraction of the cost.

zh.title: 廉价AI可能破坏OpenAI和Anthropic的IPO计划
zh.summary: 中国AI实验室以显著低廉的成本开发与美国前沿模型相当的人工智能能力，可能威胁OpenAI和Anthropic计划中的IPO。这种成本优势可能破坏AI行业的竞争格局。

title: Are supermarkets profiting from higher food prices?
summary: BBC Business examines whether UK supermarkets are profiting from the rising food prices that have affected consumers. The investigation explores the relationship between retailer margins and food price inflation.
content: Food prices in the UK have risen, but are supermarkets profiting from higher food prices? Ben Chu reports.

zh.title: 超市在食品价格上涨中获利吗？
zh.summary: BBC Business调查英国超市是否从影响消费者的食品价格上升中获利。该调查探讨了零售商利润率与食品价格通胀之间的关系。

title: Iran threatens to extend conflict ‘beyond the region’ if U.S. and Israel resume attacks
summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guard has threatened to expand the Middle East conflict beyond the region if the U.S. and Israel continue military operations against Tehran. This escalation threat highlights growing tensions in the region and raises concerns about potential broader geopolitical consequences. The warning comes amid ongoing hostilities between Iran and the U.S.-Israel alliance.
content: Iran's Revolutionary Guard on Wednesday threatened to extend the Middle East conflict "beyond the region" if the U.S. and Israel resume attacks against Tehran.

zh.title: 伊朗威胁如果美国和以色列恢复攻击将把冲突扩展到"地区之外"
zh.summary: 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队威胁，如果美国和以色列继续对德黑兰进行军事行动，将把中东冲突扩展到该地区之外。这一升级威胁凸显了该地区日益紧张的局势，引发了对更广泛地缘政治后果的担忧。这一警告是在伊朗与美以联盟之间的持续敌对行为的背景下发出的。

title: Jeff Bezos says 2-3 year timeline for space data centers is a 'little ambitious'
summary: Jeff Bezos has expressed skepticism about the feasibility of establishing space-based data centers within 2-3 years, suggesting the timeline is overly optimistic. This reflects the technical and logistical challenges of deploying infrastructure in space, a sector gaining increasing interest for computing capabilities. Bezos's comments highlight the gap between space industry ambitions and current technological reality.

zh.title: 杰夫·贝索斯称太空数据中心2-3年的时间表"有点雄心勃勃"
zh.summary: 杰夫·贝索斯对在2-3年内建立基于太空的数据中心的可行性表示怀疑，认为该时间表过于乐观。这反映了在太空中部署基础设施的技术和后勤挑战，这一领域对计算能力的兴趣日益增长。贝索斯的评论凸显了太空产业的抱负与当前技术现实之间的差距。

title: Fanatics to launch first credit card as part of broader deal with American Express
summary: Fanatics is partnering with American Express to launch a branded credit card targeting sports fans, offering rewards redeemable for team merchandise, trading cards, and collectibles. This move expands Fanatics' ecosystem and monetization strategy within the sports consumer market. The credit card partnership represents a significant step in building customer loyalty and increasing spending within their platform.
content: Fanatics is planning to put a credit card in the wallets of sports fans, allowing them to earn rewards to get team merch, trading cards and collectibles.

zh.title: Fanatics与美国运通合作推出首张信用卡
zh.summary: Fanatics与美国运通合作推出面向体育迷的品牌信用卡，提供可兑换为球队商品、交易卡和收藏品的奖励。这一举措扩展了Fanatics在体育消费市场中的生态系统和货币化战略。信用卡合作伙伴关系是建立客户忠诚度并增加其平台内消费的重要一步。

title: Global oil prices drop below $108 a barrel after Trump reaffirms he would end the war in Iran ‘very quickly’; Hormuz sees increased tanker traffic
summary: Global oil prices fell below $108 per barrel following President Trump's statements about rapidly ending the Iran conflict. The price movement reflects market expectations that reduced geopolitical tensions would increase oil supply and stability. Increased tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz suggests anticipation of normalized regional dynamics.
content: Oil futures were sliding on Wednesday following comments from President Trump that the war in Iran would be ended “very quickly.”

zh.title: 特朗普重申将"迅速"结束伊朗战争后，全球油价跌破每桶108美元；霍尔木兹海峡油轮交通增加
zh.summary: 在特朗普就快速结束伊朗冲突发表声明后，全球油价跌破每桶108美元。油价变动反映了市场预期地缘政治紧张局势缓和将增加石油供应和稳定性。通过霍尔木兹海峡的油轮交通增加表明市场预期该地区局势将趋于正常化。

title: ‘Even better than tech.’ A scramble into this sector is coming, warns veteran wealth manager.
summary: Veteran wealth manager Ted Oakley warns that the energy sector offers investment opportunities comparable to or exceeding the technology sector, prompting increased investor interest. Oxbow Advisors is positioning itself with exposure across the energy value chain, from drilling to production. This reflects a broader investment thesis that energy stocks are undervalued relative to current market dynamics.
content: Ted Oakley of Oxbow Advisors says investors need more energy sector exposure, and his company owns everything from drillers to producers.

zh.title: "甚至比科技更好"——资深财富管理人士警告能源行业即将成为投资热点
zh.summary: 资深财富管理人士泰德·欧克利警告称，能源行业提供的投资机会可与科技行业相当或超过科技行业，促使投资者兴趣激增。Oxbow Advisors正在整个能源产业链（从钻探到生产）布局。这反映了一个更广泛的投资理念，即能源股相对于当前市场动态而言被严重低估。

title: Stellantis CEO Antonio Filosa is about to unveil his plan to turn the company around as the automaker's stock lags
summary: Stellantis CEO Antonio Filosa is preparing to announce a turnaround strategy as the automaker's stock has declined nearly 30% since his appointment a year ago. The unveiling of his plan marks a critical moment for the company's future direction and investor confidence. Filosa's background within Stellantis suggests an insider's approach to addressing the company's challenges.
content: Shares of Stellantis are off nearly 30% since Antonio Filosa, a veteran who climbed through the company ranks, was named CEO nearly a year ago.

zh.title: 斯坦蒂斯CEO安东尼奥·菲洛萨即将公布扭转计划，因为该汽车制造商股价表现落后
zh.summary: 斯坦蒂斯CEO安东尼奥·菲洛萨正准备宣布一项扭转战略，因为自他一年前上任以来，该汽车制造商股价已下跌近30%。他的计划公布标志着公司未来方向和投资者信心的关键时刻。菲洛萨在斯坦蒂斯的任职背景表明他将采用内部人士的方法来应对公司挑战。

title: S&P 500 futures tick higher as oil falls and traders await Nvidia’s earnings: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock futures are rising amid falling oil prices as markets await Nvidia's first-quarter earnings report, expected after Wednesday's close. The positive sentiment reflects investor confidence in both the broader market and the tech sector. Nvidia's earnings are closely watched as a bellwether for AI industry health and chipmaker performance.
content: Chipmaker and AI darling Nvidia will report first-quarter earnings after Wednesday's closing bell.

zh.title: 随着油价下跌和交易员等待英伟达财报，标普500期货小幅上涨：实时更新
zh.summary: 在油价下跌的背景下，美国股指期货上涨，市场等待英伟达第一季度财报，预计在周三收盘后发布。积极的市场情绪反映了投资者对更广泛市场和科技板块的信心。英伟达的财报备受关注，因为它是人工智能产业健康状况和芯片制造商表现的晴雨表。

title: Here are Wednesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Broadcom, Marvell, Alphabet, Amazon, Five Below & more
summary: Major financial analysts issued significant calls on multiple technology and retail stocks including Nvidia, Broadcom, Marvell, Alphabet, Amazon, and Five Below on Wednesday. These analyst ratings and price targets help guide investor decision-making across major sectors. The concentration of calls on mega-cap tech stocks reflects their outsized influence on overall market movements.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Wednesday.

zh.title: 周三最重要的分析师评级：英伟达、博通、美满电子、谷歌、亚马逊、Five Below等
zh.summary: 主要金融分析师周三对包括英伟达、博通、美满电子、谷歌、亚马逊和Five Below在内的多只科技股和零售股发表了重要评级。这些分析师评级和目标价格帮助指导投资者在各主要部门的决策。对大型科技股的集中评级反映了它们对整体市场走势的巨大影响力。

title: Taiwan was front and center during Trump's China trip — but absent from Xi’s meeting with Putin
summary: Taiwan was a prominent discussion point during Trump's recent China meetings, yet conspicuously absent from Xi Jinping's concurrent meeting with Putin, revealing different diplomatic priorities. The contrasting agendas highlight geopolitical divisions and differing approaches to regional issues between the U.S. and Russia-China axis. The divergence underscores Taiwan's strategic importance in U.S.-China relations.
content: The meetings between China's Xi Jinping and his U.S. and Russian counterparts came just days apart, but there was a stark contrast in tone and content.

zh.title: 台湾是特朗普中国之行的焦点——但在习近平与普京的会面中缺席
zh.summary: 台湾在特朗普最近的中国会议中是一个突出的讨论话题，但在习近平与普京同时进行的会晤中明显缺席，这反映了不同的外交优先事项。相对的议程突显了地缘政治分歧以及美国与俄罗斯-中国轴心在区域问题上的不同方法。这种差异突出了台湾在美中关系中的战略重要性。

title: U.S. expected to unveil criminal charges against Cuba's Raul Castro
summary: The U.S. is expected to announce criminal charges against Cuba's former leader Raul Castro stemming from a 1996 incident where Cuban military jets shot down civilian aircraft operated by exile groups. These charges represent a significant escalation in U.S.-Cuba relations and reflect ongoing tensions dating back decades. The move signals the U.S. government's continued pursuit of accountability for Cold War-era actions.
content: The charges against Raul Castro are expected to be based on a 1996 incident in which Cuban jets shot down planes operated by a group of Cuban exiles.

zh.title: 美国预计将对古巴前领导人劳尔·卡斯特罗提出刑事指控
zh.summary: 美国预计将宣布对古巴前领导人劳尔·卡斯特罗提出刑事指控，源于1996年古巴军用战斗机击落流亡团体运营民用飞机事件。这些指控代表美国与古巴关系的重大升级，反映了可追溯数十年的持续紧张局势。此举表明美国政府继续追求对冷战时代行为的问责。

title: Fuel duty freeze extended until the end of the year
summary: The UK has extended its freeze on fuel duty through the end of the year, maintaining relief implemented during the previous Conservative government's term that began in March 2022. The freeze aims to support consumers facing energy and transportation costs amid broader economic pressures. The extension reflects ongoing government policy to manage fuel price impacts on households and businesses.
content: Fuel duty was initially cut by 5p in March 2022, under the Conservative government.

zh.title: 燃油税冻结延长至年底
zh.summary: 英国已将燃油税冻结延长至年底，维持从2022年3月开始实施的前保守党政府的救济措施。该冻结旨在支持面临能源和运输成本压力的消费者，应对更广泛的经济压力。该延期反映了政府持续的政策，以管理燃油价格对家庭和企业的影响。

title: AllianceBernstein reveals its top defense stock pick as Europe's military manufacturers retreat
summary: Investment firm AllianceBernstein has identified its top defense stock pick amid a pullback by European military manufacturers facing budget constraints and administrative hurdles. The firm's recommendation reflects challenges in Europe's defense procurement process and investment opportunities elsewhere. This highlights structural issues within Europe's defense industrial base.
content: Budget uncertainty and "procurement bureaucracy" have hindered Europe's defense sector this year, AllianceBernstein said.

zh.title: 美银美林公布顶级防务股票选择，因欧洲军事制造商撤退
zh.summary: 投资公司美银美林在欧洲军事制造商面临预算限制和行政障碍导致撤退之际，确定了其顶级防务股票选择。该公司的建议反映了欧洲国防采购流程中的挑战和其他投资机会。这突出了欧洲国防工业基础内的结构性问题。

title: Could Trump Accounts be a model for Social Security? Here's what experts say
summary: A Republican senator has suggested that newly introduced Trump Accounts for children could serve as a model for reforming Social Security into personal accounts, a proposal experts debate. The comparison raises questions about privatization strategies for the nation's retirement system. Experts discuss the merits and risks of moving toward personalized Social Security accounts.
content: New Trump Accounts for children could "become Social Security personal accounts," Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, recently said. Here's what experts say.

zh.title: 特朗普账户能否成为社会保障改革的模式？专家怎么说
zh.summary: 一位共和党参议员建议，新推出的儿童特朗普账户可以作为将社会保障改革为个人账户的模式，这是一项专家们争议的建议。这种比较引发了关于国家退休制度私有化策略的问题。专家们讨论了转向个性化社会保障账户的优点和风险。

title: Domestic rates bills debt hits £1m in Northern Ireland
summary: Northern Ireland has reached a milestone where domestic property tax (rates) debts handled by the debt advice service exceeded £1 million for the first time, signaling growing financial strain on households. The increase reflects broader economic pressures and rising cost of living affecting residents' ability to pay local taxes. The trend highlights the need for targeted financial assistance and support services in the region.
content: Advice NI said its debt advice service last year dealt with more than £1 million pounds in total rates debts for the first time.

zh.title: 北爱尔兰家庭税率账单债务达到100万英镑
zh.summary: 北爱尔兰首次达到一个里程碑，债务咨询服务处理的家庭财产税债务超过100万英镑，这表明家庭面临越来越大的财务压力。这一增加反映了更广泛的经济压力和生活成本上升，影响了居民支付地方税的能力。这一趋势突出了该地区需要有针对性的财政援助和支持服务。

title: College career path ‘over’ as skilled trade get 30% pay bump, recruitment giant says
summary: The world's largest recruitment firm suggests that traditional college education is losing appeal as skilled trades now offer competitive compensation with a 30% pay increase, reshaping career pathway expectations. The CEO's comments reflect shifting labor market dynamics where technical skills command premium wages. This trend signals a potential realignment of educational investment and career choices among younger workers.
content: "I would say you can make a good career and good money in skilled trade. That's definitely a career track," CEO of world's largest recruitment firm told CNBC.

zh.title: 招聘巨头称大学职业道路已"结束"，熟练行业获得30%加薪
zh.summary: 全球最大的招聘公司暗示，传统大学教育正在失去吸引力，因为熟练行业现在提供具有竞争力的薪酬，工资增长30%，重塑了职业道路预期。首席执行官的评论反映了技术技能获得高级工资的劳动力市场动态变化。这一趋势表明年轻员工教育投资和职业选择可能会重新调整。

title: UK loosens Russian oil sanctions as fuel prices rise
summary: The UK has eased sanctions on Russian oil imports amid supply concerns from the effective blockade of the Strait of Hormuz affecting global fuel availability. The waiver reflects mounting pressure on energy supply chains and prices.
content: The waiver reflects increasing supply concerns over certain fuels due to the effective blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 英国放宽对俄罗斯石油制裁，燃料价格上升
zh.summary: 英国在全球燃料供应受到霍尔木兹海峡有效封锁影响而出现供应问题的背景下，放宽了对俄罗斯石油进口的制裁。这一豁免反映了能源供应链和价格面临的日益增长的压力。

title: U.S. Treasury yields inch lower as bond markets price 'significant' inflation risk
summary: US Treasury yields declined as bond markets reassess significant inflation risks and their impact on economic growth. Investors continue monitoring inflation expectations amid broader economic uncertainty.
content: Yields on U.S. Treasurys moved lower early Wednesday, as investors continue to monitor "significant" inflation risks.

zh.title: 美国国债收益率下降，债券市场定价"重大"通胀风险
zh.summary: 美国国债收益率下降，因为债券市场重新评估重大通胀风险及其对经济增长的影响。投资者在更广泛的经济不确定性中继续监测通胀预期。

title: UK inflation rate eases to 2.8% in April, but slowdown is expected to be short-lived
summary: UK inflation fell to 2.8% in April, exceeding economist expectations and signaling a temporary slowdown from the prior 3.3% rate. However, experts warn this easing may prove short-lived.
content: Economists polled by Reuters had expected the inflation rate to drop back to 3%, cooling from 3.3% in March.

zh.title: 英国通胀率在4月降至2.8%，但预计放缓将是短暂的
zh.summary: 英国通胀率在4月下降至2.8%，超过经济学家预期，表明从之前的3.3%出现临时放缓。然而，专家警告这种缓解可能是短暂的。

title: Alibaba reveals more powerful Zhenwu AI chip, new LLM
summary: Alibaba unveiled a more powerful version of its Zhenwu AI chip alongside a new large language model, strengthening its competitive position in the AI market. The upgrades reflect intensifying competition in semiconductor and AI development.
content: Alibaba announced updates to its AI offerings, including a more powerful chip and a new large language model.

zh.title: 阿里巴巴推出功能更强大的芯武AI芯片和新的大语言模型
zh.summary: 阿里巴巴推出了其芯武AI芯片的更强大版本，以及一个新的大型语言模型，加强了它在人工智能市场的竞争地位。这些升级反映了半导体和人工智能开发中竞争的加剧。

title: Over 47,000 Samsung Electronics workers set to strike as wage talks break down, sending shares lower
summary: Over 47,000 Samsung Electronics workers are set to strike Thursday after wage negotiations with management collapsed. The labor action is expected to pressure the company's stock and production capacity.
content: More than 47,000 Samsung Electronics workers will begin a strike on Thursday after wage negotiations between the company and its union broke down.

zh.title: 超过47,000名三星电子员工因工资谈判破裂而准备罢工，导致股价下跌
zh.summary: 超过47,000名三星电子员工将在周四进行罢工，原因是与管理层的工资谈判破裂。这一劳动行动预计将对公司的股票和生产能力造成压力。

title: European stocks to open lower: UK inflation and elevated bond yields in focus
summary: European stock markets are expected to open lower as investors focus on UK inflation data and persistently elevated bond yields. The combination of macro headwinds is weighing on regional equity sentiment.
content: European stocks are expected to open in negative territory on Wednesday as global markets keep a close eye on elevated bond yields and UK inflation data.

zh.title: 欧洲股市开盘走低：英国通胀和上升的债券收益率成焦点
zh.summary: 欧洲股市预计开盘走低，因为投资者关注英国通胀数据和持续上升的债券收益率。宏观不利因素的组合正在压低地区股市情绪。

title: U.S. indicts four Chinese container manufacturers alleging pandemic-era price-fixing cartel
summary: The US Department of Justice indicted four Chinese container manufacturers for allegedly operating a cartel to reduce output during the pandemic era. The charges underscore growing tensions over global supply chain competition and anti-competitive behavior.
content: China International Marine Containers, Singamas Container Holdings, Shanghai Universal Logistics Equipment, and CXIC Group Containers colluded to cut container output: DOJ

zh.title: 美国起诉四家中国集装箱制造商涉嫌疫情时期价格垄断卡特尔
zh.summary: 美国司法部对四家中国集装箱制造商进行起诉，指控其在疫情时期涉嫌参与卡特尔组织以减少产出。这些指控凸显了全球供应链竞争和反竞争行为日益加剧的紧张局势。

title: Stocks under pressure as correction fears grow and record rally defies geopolitical turmoil
summary: Stock markets face increasing pressure as analysts warn of potential corrections despite a record-breaking rally that has weathered recent geopolitical turmoil. Market sentiment is shifting as participants reassess valuation risk.
content: "'The pendulum could swing backwards," analysts said on Tuesday amid mounting warnings that equities could soon change course.

zh.title: 股市承压，修正恐惧加剧，创纪录涨幅抵抗地缘政治动荡
zh.summary: 尽管创纪录的涨幅经受住了近期地缘政治动荡的考验，股市仍面临越来越大的压力，分析师警告称存在潜在的市场修正风险。随着参与者重新评估估值风险，市场情绪正在转变。

title: Putin-Xi talks revive stalled Russian gas pipeline as Iran war rattles energy markets
summary: Russian President Putin is expected to discuss reviving the long-stalled Power of Siberia 2 natural gas pipeline with Chinese leader Xi Jinping amid energy market disruption from Iran conflict developments. The pipeline revial could reshape Eurasian energy flows.
content: Putin is expected to hold talks with Chinese leader Xi Jinping on Wednesday, with the long-stalled Power of Siberia 2 natural gas pipeline topping the agenda.

zh.title: 普京-习近平会谈重启停滞的俄罗斯天然气管道，伊朗战争冲击能源市场
zh.summary: 在伊朗冲突引发能源市场中断之际，俄罗斯总统普京预计将与中国领导人习近平讨论重启长期停滞的西伯利亚力量2号天然气管道。该管道的重启可能重塑欧亚能源流。

title: China confirms order for 200 Boeing planes, calls aviation key area for U.S. cooperation
summary: China confirmed an order for 200 Boeing aircraft, marking its largest purchase in nearly a decade and signaling improved US-China trade relations. The agreement represents a major win for Boeing and broader aviation sector cooperation.
content: China has agreed to buy 200 Boeing jets, its first major order in nearly a decade, U.S. President Donald Trump said last week.

zh.title: 中国确认订购200架波音飞机，称航空是美中合作的关键领域
zh.summary: 中国确认订购200架波音飞机，这是近十年来最大规模采购，表明美中贸易关系改善。该协议对波音公司和航空部门更广泛的合作是重大利好。

title: Why fashion is doubling down on sustainability even as value-seeking shoppers ignore the pitch
summary: The fashion industry continues emphasizing sustainability initiatives despite evidence that price-conscious consumers are not prioritizing environmental credentials in purchasing decisions. The disconnect reveals tension between industry commitments and consumer behavior.
content: A strange paradox has taken hold of the global fashion industry.

zh.title: 为何时尚品牌加倍推行可持续发展，而追求性价比的消费者却不理会
zh.summary: 尽管有证据表明价格敏感的消费者在购买时不优先考虑环保认证，时尚产业仍在继续强调可持续发展举措。这种矛盾反映了行业承诺与消费者行为之间的张力。

title: China confirms it will buy 200 Boeing jets after Trump-Xi summit
summary: China formally confirmed its purchase of 200 Boeing jets following the Trump-Xi summit, with both nations agreeing to extend their October tariff truce. The agreement reflects a thaw in US-China trade tensions.
content: The two sides will also work towards an extension to the tariffs truce they agreed in October, China's Commerce Ministry said.

zh.title: 特朗普-习近平峰会后，中国确认将购买200架波音喷气式飞机
zh.summary: 中国在特朗普-习近平峰会后正式确认购买200架波音喷气式飞机，两国同意延长十月份的关税休战。该协议反映美中贸易紧张局势的缓解。

title: U.S. airlines oppose Trump plan to require small airports to use private security, Reuters reports
summary: Major US airlines are opposing a White House proposal requiring smaller airports to replace TSA security screeners with private contractors. The industry argues the plan would undermine security standards and efficiency at regional facilities.
content: A group representing major U.S. airlines opposes a White House proposal to require smaller airports to use private security screeners instead of the TSA.

zh.title: 美国航空公司反对特朗普要求小型机场使用私人安保的计划，路透社报道
zh.summary: 美国主要航空公司反对白宫提案，该提案要求小型机场用私人承包商替代美国运输安全管理局的安检人员。业界辩称该计划会削弱区域设施的安全标准和效率。

title: Nvidia to launch Singapore research hub as city-state boosts AI plans
summary: Nvidia announced plans to establish a research hub in Singapore, including the city-state's first physical AI testbed for research and deployment. The investment reflects Singapore's emergence as a strategic hub for AI innovation and development.
content: Singapore has announced a new Nvidia research center and its first testbed to research, test and deploy physical AI, along with industry leaders.

zh.title: 随着城市国家推进AI计划，英伟达将在新加坡推出研究中心
zh.summary: 英伟达宣布计划在新加坡建立研究中心，包括该城市国家首个物理AI测试平台，用于研究和部署。该投资反映了新加坡作为AI创新和发展战略枢纽的崛起。

title: Singapore inks AI deals with Google, OpenAI as ChatGPT-maker commits $234 million to local ecosystem
summary: Singapore signed new AI partnerships with Google and OpenAI, with OpenAI committing $234 million to develop local AI capabilities and infrastructure. The deals position Singapore as a key global hub for AI development and collaboration.
content: Singapore has signed new partnerships with Google and OpenAI to strengthen the city-state's position as a global AI hub and accelerating AI deployment.

zh.title: 随着ChatGPT制造商承诺投入2.34亿美元，新加坡与谷歌、OpenAI签署AI协议
zh.summary: 新加坡与谷歌和OpenAI签署新的AI伙伴关系协议，OpenAI承诺投入2.34亿美元开发本地AI能力和基础设施。这些协议将新加坡定位为全球AI开发和协作的关键枢纽。

title: Goldman Sachs says AI and energy resilience are creating a North-South divide in Asian markets
summary: Goldman Sachs reports that North Asian markets are outperforming South Asian peers due to stronger fiscal capacity and AI development advantages. This divergence reflects how technological advancement and economic resources are creating distinct investment trajectories across the region.
content: North Asian markets are outperforming South Asian markets, supported by stronger fiscal ability and AI developments, Goldman said.

zh.title: 高盛表示人工智能和能源韧性在亚洲市场造成南北分化
zh.summary: 高盛报告称，由于财政实力更强且人工智能发展优势，北亚市场的表现优于南亚同行。这种分化反映了技术进步和经济资源如何在整个地区创造了不同的投资轨迹。

title: Another Trump victory: Republican Rep. Thomas Massie loses Kentucky primary
summary: President Trump's endorsed candidate defeated Rep. Thomas Massie in the Kentucky Republican primary, marking another successful intervention in party races. Massie had opposed key GOP priorities, making him a target for Trump-backed opposition.
content: President Donald Trump had targeted Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., for opposing GOP priorities.

zh.title: 又一场特朗普胜利：共和党众议员托马斯·马西在肯塔基州初选中落败
zh.summary: 特朗普支持的候选人在肯塔基州共和党初选中击败了众议员托马斯·马西，标志着特朗普在党派竞赛中又一次成功干预。马西曾反对关键的共和党优先事项，使他成为特朗普支持的反对力量的目标。

title: Asia markets open lower as Treasury yields climb and Iran tensions linger
summary: Asia-Pacific stock markets declined as investors reacted to rising U.S. Treasury yields and escalating geopolitical tensions with Iran. The combination of higher bond yields and regional instability pressured equities across the region.
content: Asia-Pacific markets fell on Wednesday as investors weighed elevated bond yields and renewed geopolitical tensions.

zh.title: 随着美国国债收益率上升和伊朗紧张局势持续，亚洲市场低开
zh.summary: 亚太股市下跌，因为投资者对美国国债收益率上升和伊朗地缘政治紧张局势升级作出反应。更高的债券收益率和地区不稳定性的结合对整个地区的股票造成了压力。

title: UBS says China tech trade ‘makes a lot of sense’ as AI ecosystem grows
summary: UBS argues that Chinese technology stocks present an attractive investment opportunity as China's AI ecosystem expands and U.S.-China tensions ease. The improving conditions are reviving analyst interest in Chinese equities after prior geopolitical concerns.
content: An expanding AI ecosystem and easing tensions with the U.S. are reviving the case for Chinese equities, particularly tech stocks, according to UBS.

zh.title: 瑞银表示，随着人工智能生态系统的增长，中国科技贸易"很有意义"
zh.summary: 瑞银辩称，随着中国人工智能生态系统的扩展和美中紧张局势缓解，中国科技股票呈现出有吸引力的投资机会。不断改善的条件正在恢复分析师对中国股票的兴趣，此前由于地缘政治问题而受到关注。

title: My late mother’s bank account is $2,000 short. Can the bank legally refuse to provide her final statement?
summary: A beneficiary questions banking regulations when a deceased relative's account is short funds and the bank may be unwilling to provide documentation. The case highlights consumer rights issues in inheritance situations and account transparency.
content: ‘I am the beneficiary on her checking account’

zh.title: 我已故母亲的银行账户缺少2000美元。银行是否可以合法拒绝提供她的最终结算单？
zh.summary: 一位受益人在已故亲属的账户资金不足且银行可能不愿提供文件时质疑银行法规。该案例突出了继承情况下的消费者权利问题和账户透明度。

title: I’m selling my $1 million Maui home. Will my agent charge me less than a 6% commission?
summary: A homeowner questions whether the traditional 6% real estate commission model is changing following 2024 legislation aimed at reforming industry practices. The article examines whether sellers can negotiate lower fees in a shifting market.
content: “Legislation introduced in 2024 was designed to finally upend the traditional 6% real-estate commission model.”

zh.title: 我正在出售我在毛伊岛价值100万美元的房产。我的代理人会向我收取低于6%的佣金吗？
zh.summary: 一位房主质疑在旨在改革行业做法的2024年立法之后，传统的6%房地产佣金模式是否在改变。本文研究了卖家在变化的市场中是否可以协商降低费用。
